entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop affected by groundnut rosette disease

entities.name: GROUNDNUT ROSETTE DISEASE
entities.description: A plant virus disease first reported in 1907 that affects groundnuts

entities.name: PLANT VIRUS DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases caused by plant viruses, often involving synergistic interactions

entities.name: CAUSATIVE VIRUSES
entities.description: Viruses that cause plant virus diseases and may facilitate each other's survival and spread

entities.name: SYNERGISTIC INTERACTIONS
entities.description: Interactions between viruses where one facilitates the other's molecular function for survival and spread

entities.name: TANGANYIKA
entities.description: The location where groundnut rosette disease was first reported in 1907

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The region where effective control of groundnut rosette disease is needed
